archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Dark Mode variant) mixed with Retro-Futurism/Terminal elements

core_principles: Code is Art: Treat data and developer updates with the respect of a portfolio piece.
Density without Clutter: High information density required for devs, managed via strict grid systems and typographic hierarchy.
Contrast over Color: Rely on deep blacks (Zinc-950) and stark whites for readability, using Electric Amber exclusively for action and celebration.
Tactile Terminal: Interfaces should feel like a modern IDE - crisp borders, mono-spaced data points, and glowing active states.
anti_patterns: No purple or teal green accents.
No muddy gray backgrounds; use rich, tinted dark neutrals.
No excessive soft shadows; use 1px solid borders for separation.

headings.description: Used for all H1-H4. High personality, stark, and modern.
headings.weight_strategy: font-black for impact, font-medium for standard section headers

body.description: Clean, highly readable geometric sans for dense activity feeds and comments.

mono.description: CRITICAL: Use for timestamps, code snippets, project status labels, metrics, and overlines.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold leading-tight

surface.description: Primary surface for project cards, feed items, and forms.

surface_elevated.description: Dropdowns, popovers, and elevated hover states.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_system: Use generous spacing (p-6, p-8) within cards. Use tight gaps (gap-4) for data density.

grids.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Dashboards must fill vertical space.
grids.activity_feed: grid-cols-1 max-w-2xl mx-auto gap-8 (Single column layout to focus on timeline storytelling).
grids.celebration_wall: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 (Mode A: Tetris Grid for artful display).

borders_and_radius.radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px). Emphasize sharp, technical edges.
borders_and_radius.strategy: Use 1px borders heavily (border-zinc-800) to create 'Grid Borders' tech look.

buttons.primary: bg-amber-500 text-zinc-950 font-semibold px-6 py-2.5 rounded-sm hover:bg-amber-400 transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-amber-500/50
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-zinc-700 px-6 py-2.5 rounded-sm hover:border-zinc-500 hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 px-4 py-2 rounded-sm transition-colors

cards.project_card: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 p-6 rounded-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-amber-500/50 transition-all duration-300
cards.feed_item: bg-transparent border-b border-zinc-800 py-6 pl-4 border-l-2 border-l-zinc-800 hover:border-l-amber-500 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 text-white rounded-sm px-4 py-2 focus:border-amber-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-500 transition-all placeholder:text-zinc-600

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-800

badges.style: font-mono text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider

hero_background.description: Abstract dev network background for landing page hero. Apply a bg-zinc-950/80 overlay to ensure text readability.

celebration_wall_background.description: Vibrant glowing geometric confetti. Use as a subtle parallax background for the Celebration Wall section.

tech_surface_accent.description: Use for prominent call-to-action sections or login/auth split screen backgrounds.

abstract_terminal_code.description: Fallback image for projects without custom covers or for developer profiles.

icons.strategy: Use purely structural icons. Stroke width 1.5. No fill.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must explicitly define hover color and background. Cards elevate slightly (-translate-y-1).
interactions_and_motion.feed_animations: Stagger entrance of feed items on scroll using Framer Motion.
interactions_and_motion.celebration_effect: Completed projects should feature a subtle 'Tracing Beam' or glowing border effect using Framer Motion.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against dark surfaces meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs, cards) MUST have a kebab-case data-testid attribute mapped to their role.
accessibility_and_testing.focus_rings: Keyboard navigation must be visible. Use 'focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-amber-500'.

implementation_instructions.step_1: Configure Tailwind config with extended colors (Zinc/Amber), fonts (Cabinet Grotesk, Manrope, JetBrains Mono), and sharp border radii.
implementation_instructions.step_2: Build standard Shadcn UI components but strip rounding (rounded-sm) and update default borders to border-zinc-800.
implementation_instructions.step_3: Implement Layouts: Dashboard grid, single-column Activity Feed with left border timeline, and asymmetric grid for Celebration Wall.
implementation_instructions.step_4: Integrate background media URLs into sections with appropriate opacity overlays to maintain contrast.
